person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Baldwin  French: Baudouin, Dutch: Boudewijn
Birthdate:	1088
Birthplace: Mons, Hainault, Flemish region, Holy Roman Empire (now Belgium) 
Death:  before circa June 1119  Mons, Hainaut, Belgium  
Place of Burial:	Sainte-Waudru de Mons, Mons, Hainault, Belgium

Immediate Family:	
Son of Baldwin II, count of Hainault and Ida of Leuven 
Husband of Yolanda von Wassenberg, gravin van Gelre, Wassenberg 
Father of Baldwin IV, count of Hainaut; Yolande de Hainault; Ida de Hainault; Richildis de Hainault and Gerhard I of Hainault, Graaf van Dale 

Brother of Arnoul de Hainault; Alix van Henegouwen *; Richilde de Hainaut; Louis de Hainaut; Simon Of Hainaut; Henry Of Hainaut; Willem Of Hainaut and Ida de Hainaut  
Occupation:  Comte de Hainaut, III Count of Hainaut, 1098/1120, de Valenciennes, d'Ostrevant, comte de Hainaut

Baldwin married Yolande of Guelders at a young age. He had been betrothed to Adelaide of Maurienne, a niece of Countess Clemence of Flanders. The broken betrothal caused a scandal, and Countess Clemence brought the issue before her brother Pope Calixtus I

zh.lifeSummary: 當Baudouin III de HAINAUT於1088年8月10日出生在比利時海瑙特蒙斯時，他的父親Baudouin II de Hainaut32歲，母親Ida van Leuven26歲。他於1107年與Yolande von Geldern-Wassenberg在比利時結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1120年6月24日在他的家鄉享年31歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可海瑙爾特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Baudouin III de HAINAUT于1088年8月10日出生在比利时海瑙特蒙斯时，他的父亲Baudouin II de Hainaut32岁，母亲Ida van Leuven26岁。他于1107年与Yolande von Geldern-Wassenberg在比利时结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1120年6月24日在他的家乡享年31岁，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可海瑙爾特。

nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Baudouin III de HAINAUT was born on 10 August 1088, in Mons, Hainaut, Belgium, his father, Baudouin II de Hainaut, was 32 and his mother, Ida van Leuven, was 26. He married Yolande von Geldern-Wassenberg in 1107, in Belgium. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 24 June 1120, in his hometown, at the age of 31, and was buried in Hainault, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baudouin III de HAINAUT est né le 10 août 1088, à Mons, Hainaut, Belgique, son père, Baudouin II de Hainaut, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Ida van Leuven, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Yolande von Geldern-Wassenberg en 1107, à Belgique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 24 juin 1120, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 31 ans, et a été enterré à Hainault, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Baudouin III de HAINAUT am 10. August 1088 in Mons, Hennegau, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Baudouin II de Hainaut 32 und seine Mutter Ida van Leuven 26. Er hat 1107 in Belgien Yolande von Geldern-Wassenberg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 24. Juni 1120 im Alter von 31 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Hainault, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Baudouin III de HAINAUT è nato il il 10 agosto 1088 nel Mons, Hainaut, Belgio, il suo padre, Baudouin II de Hainaut, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Ida van Leuven, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Yolande von Geldern-Wassenberg nel 1107, nel Belgio. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 24 giugno 1120, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 31 anni, e fu sepolto a Hainault, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Baudouin III de HAINAUTが1088年8月10日にベルギーヘイナトモンスで生まれた時，父Baudouin II de Hainautは32歳，母Ida van Leuvenは26歳であった。1107年にベルギーでYolande von Geldern-Wassenbergと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1120年6月24日に故郷で31歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスヘイナウルトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Baudouin III de HAINAUT(이)가 1088년 8월 10일 벨기에 하인오트 몬스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Baudouin II de Hainaut(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Ida van Leuven(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1107년 벨기에에서 Yolande von Geldern-Wassenberg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1120년 6월 24일 그의 고향에서 31세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 하인오트에 묻혔다.

pt.10 AUG 1088–24 JUN 1120: 10 de agosto de 1088–24 de junho de 1120
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baudouin III de HAINAUT nasceu em 10 de agosto de 1088, em Mons, Hainaut, Bélgica, seu pai, Baudouin II de Hainaut, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Ida van Leuven, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Yolande von Geldern-Wassenberg em 1107, em Bélgica. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de junho de 1120, em sua cidade natal, com 31 anos, e foi sepultado em Hainault, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baudouin III de HAINAUT родился 10 августа 1088 г. в местности монс, ханаут, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Baudouin II de Hainaut было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Ida van Leuven, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Yolande von Geldern-Wassenberg в 1107 г. в местности Бельгия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 24 июня 1120 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 31 год и был похоронен в местности ханаулт, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

sm.from 1098 to 1119: mai le 1098 e o'o I le 1119

es.10 AUG 1088–24 JUN 1120: 10 de agosto de 1088–24 de junio de 1120
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Baudouin III de HAINAUT nació el 10 de agosto de 1088, en Mons, Hainaut, Bélgica, su papá, Baudouin II de Hainaut, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Ida van Leuven, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Yolande von Geldern-Wassenberg en 1107, en Bélgica. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 24 de junio de 1120, en su pueblo, a la edad de 31 años, y fue sepultado en Hainault, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
